slugs.concept: A bookkeeper sorts invoices and ledgers while handing a bound financial file to a colleague.
A tactile model-selection workshop weighs colored data batches before routing them through greenhouse-like test stages.
Travelers clarify a translated handoff on a rainy train platform before continuing in different directions.
A spinner and knitter turn separate colored strands into one branching narrative textile.
A salesperson prepares a sealed follow-up letter while a prospect waits across a glass partition.
A tiny messenger navigates a neighborhood of distinct service paths linking correspondence, appointments, repairs, and delivery.
A portrait artist compares a proof print with a retouched portrait while checking fine details through a loupe.
A small group reviews conversation cards, marks a response, and hands the selected answer onward.
A backstage crew builds and hands off painted stage elements toward a live production.

visual_inspection: passed 9/9 recovered PNGs; chronological mapping confirmed by content; no rejected images
